subcodes.first_line: O divine Trustee! A supplication do I offer, seeking forgiveness for that bird of the celestial nest, the blessed soul of Áqá Siyyid [3.5s]... ...O Amín! Praised be God, you were present in Europe and witnessed how, with a constitution weakened to the utmost, ‘Abdu’l-Baha spent night and day in service
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین الهی مناجاتی در طلب مغفرت بجهت مرغ آشیان الهی نفس مبارک آقا سید
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
